pdfMultiTool.name: PDF Multi Tool
pdfMultiTool.subtitle: Merge, Split, Organize, Delete, Rotate, Add Blank Pages, Extract and Duplicate in an unified interface.

mergePdf.name: Merge PDF
mergePdf.subtitle: Combine multiple PDFs into one file. Preserves Bookmarks.

splitPdf.name: Split PDF
splitPdf.subtitle: Extract a range of pages into a new PDF.

compressPdf.name: Compress PDF
compressPdf.subtitle: Reduce the file size of your PDF.
compressPdf.condenseInfo: Condense uses advanced compression: removes dead-weight, optimizes images, subsets fonts. Best for most PDFs.
compressPdf.photonInfo: Photon converts pages to images. Use for photo-heavy/scanned PDFs.
compressPdf.photonWarning: Warning: Text will become non-selectable and links will stop working.
compressPdf.grayscaleHint: Reduces file size by removing color information

pdfEditor.name: PDF Editor
pdfEditor.subtitle: Annotate, highlight, redact, comment, add shapes/images, search, and view PDFs.

jpgToPdf.name: JPG to PDF
jpgToPdf.subtitle: Create a PDF from JPG, JPEG, and JPEG2000 (JP2/JPX) images.

signPdf.name: Sign PDF
signPdf.subtitle: Draw, type, or upload your signature.

cropPdf.name: Crop PDF
cropPdf.subtitle: Trim the margins of every page in your PDF.

extractPages.name: Extract Pages
extractPages.subtitle: Save a selection of pages as new files.

deletePages.name: Delete Pages
deletePages.subtitle: Remove specific pages from your document.

editBookmarks.name: Edit Bookmarks
editBookmarks.subtitle: Add, edit, import, delete and extract PDF bookmarks.

tableOfContents.name: Table of Contents
tableOfContents.subtitle: Generate a table of contents page from PDF bookmarks.

pageNumbers.name: Page Numbers
pageNumbers.subtitle: Insert page numbers into your document.

addPageLabels.name: Add Page Labels
addPageLabels.subtitle: Apply PDF page labels with Roman numerals, prefixes, and custom starts.
addPageLabels.howLabelsWorkStep1: Leave Page Range empty to label all pages.
addPageLabels.howLabelsWorkStep2: Use styles like Roman numerals for front matter and decimal numbering for the main body.
addPageLabels.howLabelsWorkStep3: Use Prefix with Start Value 0 to create labels such as A-0, A-1, A-2.
addPageLabels.howLabelsWorkStep4: Enable progress when one rule uses a disjoint range such as 1-9,30-40 or odd.
addPageLabels.removeExistingLabels: Remove existing page labels before applying these rules
addPageLabels.cpdfNote: This tool uses CoherentPDF in your browser. If CoherentPDF is not configured, you will be prompted to set it up in WASM Settings.
addPageLabels.howItWorksUploadDescription: Choose the PDF you want to relabel.
addPageLabels.howItWorksDefineDescription: Set one or more page label rules with page ranges, styles, prefixes, and starting values.
addPageLabels.howItWorksDownloadDescription: Save the updated PDF with its new page labels.
addPageLabels.faqWhatIsAnswer: A page label is the numbering shown by PDF readers in thumbnails, page navigation, and print dialogs. It does not print new text onto the page itself.
addPageLabels.faqMixQuestion: Can I mix Roman numerals and normal numbers?
addPageLabels.faqMixAnswer: Yes. Add multiple rules, such as 1-4 with LowercaseRoman and 5-20 with DecimalArabic.
addPageLabels.faqPrivacyAnswer: Yes. The processing happens in your browser using CoherentPDF WASM. Your PDF does not leave your device.
addPageLabels.invalidFileMessage: Please upload a valid PDF file.
addPageLabels.protectedPdfMessage: This PDF is password-protected. Please use the Decrypt or Change Permissions tool first.
addPageLabels.loadErrorMessage: Failed to load PDF file. The file may be invalid, corrupted, or password-protected.
addPageLabels.examplesNote: Examples: 1-4 for Roman front matter, 15-20 with prefix A- and start value 0, or odd with progress enabled.
addPageLabels.uploadFirstMessage: Please upload a PDF file first.
addPageLabels.invalidRangeMessage: Rule {{number}} has an invalid page range: {{range}}

addWatermark.subtitle: Stamp text or an image over your PDF pages.

removeBlankPages.sensitivityHint: Higher = stricter, only purely blank pages. Lower = allows pages with some content.

pdfToText.subtitle: Extract text from PDF files and save as plain text (.txt). Supports multiple files.
pdfToText.note: This tool works ONLY with digitally created PDFs. For scanned documents or image-based PDFs, use our OCR PDF tool instead.

digitalSignPdf.name: Digital Signature PDF
digitalSignPdf.pageTitle: Digital Signature PDF - Add Cryptographic Signature | BentoPDF
digitalSignPdf.subtitle: Add a cryptographic digital signature to your PDF using X.509 certificates. Supports PKCS#12 (.pfx, .p12) and PEM formats. Your private key never leaves your browser.
digitalSignPdf.successMessage: PDF signed successfully! The signature can be verified in any PDF reader.

validateSignaturePdf.name: Validate PDF Signature
validateSignaturePdf.pageTitle: Validate PDF Signature - Verify Digital Signatures | BentoPDF
validateSignaturePdf.subtitle: Verify digital signatures in your PDF files. Check certificate validity, view signer details, and confirm document integrity. All processing happens in your browser.

timestampPdf.name: Timestamp PDF
timestampPdf.pageTitle: Timestamp PDF Online Free - RFC 3161 Document Timestamp | BentoPDF
timestampPdf.subtitle: Add an RFC 3161 document timestamp to your PDF using a trusted Time Stamp Authority (TSA) server. Proves your document existed at a specific point in time. No certificate required.
timestampPdf.successMessage: PDF timestamped successfully! The timestamp can be verified in Adobe Acrobat and other PDF readers.

emailToPdf.name: Email to PDF
emailToPdf.subtitle: Convert email files (EML, MSG) to PDF format. Supports Outlook exports and standard email formats.

fontToOutline.name: Font to Outline

deskewPdf.subtitle: Automatically straighten tilted scanned pages using OpenCV.

pdfToWord.name: PDF to Word
pdfToWord.subtitle: Convert PDF files to editable Word documents.

extractImages.subtitle: Extract all embedded images from your PDF files.

pdfToMarkdown.subtitle: Convert PDF text and tables to Markdown format.

preparePdfForAi.name: Prepare PDF for AI

pdfWorkflow.name: PDF Workflow Builder
pdfWorkflow.subtitle: Build custom PDF processing pipelines with a visual node editor.
pdfWorkflow.addNodeError: Add at least one node to run the workflow.
pdfWorkflow.needInputOutput: Your workflow needs at least one input node and one output node to run.
pdfWorkflow.templateExists: A template with this name already exists.
pdfWorkflow.noSettings: No configurable settings for this node.

pdfOverlay.name: PDF Overlay
pdfOverlay.subtitle: Overlay or underlay pages from one PDF onto another.
pdfOverlay.pageRangeHint: Use "z" for the last page. Leave empty to apply to all pages.
pdfOverlay.repeatLabel: Loop overlay/underlay pages if base is longer
pdfOverlay.howItWorksUploadDescription: Upload your base PDF and the PDF you want to overlay or underlay.
pdfOverlay.howItWorksModeDescription: Select overlay (on top) or underlay (behind). Optionally set a page range and repeat.
pdfOverlay.howItWorksDownloadDescription: Download your PDF with the overlay or underlay applied.
pdfOverlay.faqDifferenceQuestion: What is the difference between overlay and underlay?
pdfOverlay.faqDifferenceAnswer: Overlay places pages on top of your base PDF (like a watermark). Underlay places pages behind your base PDF (like a letterhead or background).
pdfOverlay.faqSinglePageQuestion: Can I use a single-page PDF as overlay for all pages?
pdfOverlay.faqSinglePageAnswer: Yes! Enable the "Loop" option and your overlay PDF pages will repeat across all base pages. A single-page watermark will apply to every page.
pdfOverlay.faqPrivacyQuestion: Are my files private and secure?
pdfOverlay.faqPrivacyAnswer: Absolutely! All processing happens in your browser. Your files never leave your device, ensuring complete privacy.
